An unidentified '''Quarren Jedi student''' was a trainee at the [[Jedi Praxeum]] on [[Yavin 4/Legends|Yavin 4]]. He was present at the [[Wedding of Luke Skywalker and Mara Jade|Jedi wedding]] of [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] and [[Mara Jade Skywalker|Mara Jade]].

==Appearances==
*[[Union 2|''Union'' 2]] {{1st}}
